name: Kanto
description: The classic region where it all began. Home to the original 151 Pokemon.

dialog.intro: I'm Brock! I'm the Pewter City Gym Leader! My rock-hard willpower is evident!
dialog.defeat: Your Pokemon's trust in you is incredible! Take this Boulder Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Misty! My policy is an all-out offensive with water-type Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You really are a tough trainer! Here, take the Cascade Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Lt. Surge! I've been to war and survived with my electric Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: The Thunder Badge is yours! Your Pokemon fought with real spirit!

dialog.intro: I'm Erika. I adore grass-type Pokemon. Shall we battle?
dialog.defeat: You're so talented! Here, take the Rainbow Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Koga! A master of poison techniques! Fwahahaha!
dialog.defeat: You have proven your worth! Take the Soul Badge!

dialog.intro: I had a vision of you coming. I'm Sabrina. I see you losing!
dialog.defeat: Your power... it exceeds what I foresaw. Take the Marsh Badge.

dialog.intro: I'm Blaine! My fiery Pokemon will incinerate all challengers!
dialog.defeat: You have beaten my fire! Take the Volcano Badge as proof!

dialog.intro: I'm Giovanni! I'll show you the true power of ground-type Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: Ha! You have proven yourself worthy! Take the Earth Badge!

dialog.intro: Welcome to the Pokemon League! I am Lorelei. No one can best my icy Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You're better than I thought! Go on ahead!

dialog.intro: I am Bruno of the Elite Four! Through rigorous training, my fighting Pokemon have become the strongest!
dialog.defeat: Your strength exceeds mine! Move forward, challenger!

dialog.intro: I am Agatha. I've heard of your exploits! Let me show you what ghost Pokemon can do!
dialog.defeat: You win! I see now why Oak's taken interest in you. Continue on!

dialog.intro: I am Lance, the last of the Elite Four! My dragon Pokemon will crush you!
dialog.defeat: Incredible! You've conquered the Elite Four! Now face the Champion!

dialog.intro: So, you finally made it! I'm the Pokemon League Champion! You think you can beat ME?
dialog.defeat: NO! That's impossible! You beat me? ...Fine. You are the new Champion!

name: Johto
description: A region of tradition and ancient legends. Home to the Legendary Beasts.

dialog.intro: I'm Falkner, the Violet City Gym Leader! My father's Pokemon are my pride!
dialog.defeat: I see... My father's Pokemon have lost. Here, the Zephyr Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Bugsy! I never lose when it comes to bug-type Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You're incredible! Here, take the Hive Badge!

dialog.intro: Everyone's so mean to me! But I'm not gonna lose!
dialog.defeat: Waaah! You're so mean! ...Fine, take the Plain Badge!

dialog.intro: I see everything with my mind's eye. I'm Morty, master of ghosts!
dialog.defeat: I see your bond with your Pokemon transcends this realm. The Fog Badge is yours.

dialog.intro: I'm Chuck! My fighting Pokemon are powerful enough to move mountains!
dialog.defeat: What incredible fighting spirit! The Storm Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Jasmine... Um, I use steel-type Pokemon...
dialog.defeat: You're very strong... Here, the Mineral Badge...

dialog.intro: I'm Pryce. I've trained Pokemon since before you were born!
dialog.defeat: You've shown me warmth I thought was lost. Take the Glacier Badge.

dialog.intro: I'm Clair! The dragon master of Blackthorn City!
dialog.defeat: I can't believe I lost... Fine! Take the Rising Badge!

dialog.intro: I am Will! I have trained all around the world to learn psychic techniques!
dialog.defeat: I see... Your willpower is incredible. Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Koga of the Elite Four! My ninja techniques are unmatched!
dialog.defeat: Your skills rival my own. Proceed, challenger!

dialog.intro: I am Bruno! We will battle with the strongest of Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: Having lost, I have no right to say anything. Go on!

dialog.intro: I am Karen. Strong Pokemon, weak Pokemon — it only matters how you train them.
dialog.defeat: You've proven that love for Pokemon transcends strength. Go!

dialog.intro: I am the Champion, Lance the dragon master! You dare challenge me?
dialog.defeat: You are now the greatest trainer in all of Johto. Congratulations, Champion!

name: Hoenn
description: A tropical region of seas and volcanoes. Home to ancient titans of land and sea.

dialog.intro: I'm Roxanne, the Rock-type gym leader. I learned a lot at the Trainer School!
dialog.defeat: You're an excellent trainer! The Stone Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Brawly! I train with my Pokemon in the ocean waves!
dialog.defeat: Whooa! You made a tsunami of an impression! Take the Knuckle Badge!

dialog.intro: Wahahahah! I'm Wattson! I'll make sparks fly!
dialog.defeat: Wahahahah! Fine, fine, you got me! Take the Dynamo Badge!

dialog.intro: Welcome to the Lavaridge Gym! I'm Flannery and I'm burning with passion!
dialog.defeat: You're too hot to handle! Take the Heat Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Norman, your father! But in this gym, I'm just the leader. No holding back!
dialog.defeat: I lost to my own child... I'm so proud! Take the Balance Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Winona! I soar the skies with my bird Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You've clipped my wings! Take the Feather Badge!

dialog.intro: We're Tate and Liza! Our psychic bond lets us battle as one!
dialog.defeat: Our psychic link couldn't overcome your strength! The Mind Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I am Wallace. I represent beauty and elegance in battle!
dialog.defeat: Your battle style was truly beautiful. Take the Rain Badge!

dialog.intro: Welcome, challenger! I'm Sidney of the Elite Four! Let's do this!
dialog.defeat: Well, how about that! You've got guts! Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Phoebe! My bond with ghost Pokemon is deeper than you can imagine!
dialog.defeat: The spirits tell me you're the real deal. Continue!

dialog.intro: I am Glacia of the Elite Four. Prepare to be frozen solid!
dialog.defeat: Your fire burns brighter than my ice. Advance!

dialog.intro: I am Drake! I've sailed the world training my dragon Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: Superb! You're worthy of facing the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Steven Stone, the Hoenn Champion. My steel Pokemon are as hard as the rare stones I collect!
dialog.defeat: Your strength is as rare as the stones I seek. Congratulations, Champion!

name: Sinnoh
description: A northern region of mountains and myth. Home to the gods of time and space.

dialog.intro: I'm Roark, the Oreburgh Gym Leader! My Pokemon are tougher than any rock!
dialog.defeat: Your strength surpasses even the hardest rocks! Take the Coal Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Gardenia! I love grass-type Pokemon more than anything!
dialog.defeat: You're really great! Take the Forest Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Maylene! I've been training since I was little! My fighting Pokemon and I are ready!
dialog.defeat: You're an amazing trainer! The Cobble Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Crasher Wake! My water Pokemon crash like tidal waves!
dialog.defeat: You've weathered my storm! Take the Fen Badge!

dialog.intro: Ohohoho! I am Fantina! My ghost Pokemon will make you tremble!
dialog.defeat: Magnifique! Your skill is formidable! Take the Relic Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Byron! My steel Pokemon are forged in the depths of the earth!
dialog.defeat: You've struck gold, trainer! Take the Mine Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Candice! I love ice-type Pokemon! Let's have a cool battle!
dialog.defeat: You totally melted my defense! Take the Icicle Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Volkner. I've been bored with weak challengers... Show me your best!
dialog.defeat: Ah, finally! A trainer who excites me! Take the Beacon Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Aaron of the Elite Four! People are wrong to underestimate bugs!
dialog.defeat: You've proven that skill matters more than type! Keep going!

dialog.intro: I'm Bertha. I've been with my ground Pokemon longer than you've been alive!
dialog.defeat: You young ones are so full of energy! Advance!

dialog.intro: I'm Flint! My burning passion for battle is hotter than any flame!
dialog.defeat: Your spirit burns brighter than mine! Go face Lucian!

dialog.intro: I'm Lucian. I've read every book on battle strategy. Let's see if practice beats theory!
dialog.defeat: It seems real experience trumps theory. Face the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Cynthia, the Sinnoh Champion. I've been looking forward to battling you!
dialog.defeat: That was a truly magnificent battle! You've earned the title of Champion!

name: Unova
description: A distant, diverse region inspired by a great city. Home to Reshiram and Zekrom.

dialog.intro: I'm Cilan! It's time for a battle with the finest ingredients!
dialog.defeat: Excellent seasoning in your battle style! The Trio Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Lenora! I'll show you the power of knowledge and normal-type Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You're a fascinating trainer! Take the Basic Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Burgh, the artist! My bug Pokemon inspire my greatest works!
dialog.defeat: Your battling was a true masterpiece! The Insect Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Elesa, the shining beauty! My electric Pokemon will dazzle you!
dialog.defeat: Your battle style is electrifying! Take the Bolt Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Clay! In the mining business, we don't take kindly to pushovers!
dialog.defeat: Well, I'll be! You struck gold, partner! Take the Quake Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Skyla! I fly through the sky as free as the wind!
dialog.defeat: You've soared past my defenses! The Jet Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Brycen. My icy Pokemon reflect my disciplined spirit!
dialog.defeat: Your passion thawed my frozen defenses! Take the Freeze Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Drayden! My dragon Pokemon are as fierce as my own spirit!
dialog.defeat: You've earned the right to face the Elite Four! Take the Legend Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Shauntal! I write novels about ghost Pokemon. Shall I make you a character?
dialog.defeat: What a dramatic ending! I must write about this! Continue!

dialog.intro: I'm Grimsley! Life is a gamble, and so is battle!
dialog.defeat: It seems luck was on your side today. Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Caitlin... I see your dreams and aspirations. Let's battle!
dialog.defeat: Your dreams are powerful. I'll remember this battle always. Go!

dialog.intro: I'm Marshal! I train my body and my fighting Pokemon to their limits!
dialog.defeat: Your fighting spirit is incredible! Face the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Alder, the Unova Champion! I wander this region seeking the meaning of strength!
dialog.defeat: Ha! You've shown me what true strength is! You're the new Champion!

name: Kalos
description: An elegant region of beauty and fashion. Birthplace of Mega Evolution.

dialog.intro: I'm Viola! I'll capture your Pokemon in my web of strategies!
dialog.defeat: Wonderful shots! Take the Bug Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Grant! I climb the highest walls — just like my rock Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You've scaled my toughest challenge! Take the Cliff Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Korrina! My Lucario and I share the power of Mega Evolution!
dialog.defeat: Your fighting spirit is incredible! Take the Rumble Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Ramos! These old bones still have plenty of fight, like a mighty oak!
dialog.defeat: You've got the spirit of spring! Take the Plant Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Clemont! Science is the future, and so are electric Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: Your data is impressive! Take the Voltage Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Valerie... I design clothes for Pokemon... and I battle, too...
dialog.defeat: Your Pokemon are as beautiful as my finest designs. The Fairy Badge!

dialog.intro: I am Olympia! The stars have foretold your arrival!
dialog.defeat: The stars did not lie — your destiny is great! Take the Psychic Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Wulfric! My ice Pokemon are as powerful as avalanches!
dialog.defeat: You've conquered the blizzard! Take the Iceberg Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Malva! I'll show you the burning passion of fire Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: You've burned brighter than my flames! Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Siebold! Battling is like cooking — it requires the finest ingredients!
dialog.defeat: A Michelin-star performance! Proceed!

dialog.intro: I am Wikstrom! My steel Pokemon are my sword and shield!
dialog.defeat: You have bested this knight! Advance with honor!

dialog.intro: I'm Drasna! I simply love dragon Pokemon! They're so majestic!
dialog.defeat: Oh my! You're simply wonderful! Go face the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Diantha, the Kalos Champion! Shall we have a beautiful battle?
dialog.defeat: Magnifique! You've won with grace and power! You're the new Champion!

name: Alola
description: A sunny island paradise with unique trials. Home to the Ultra Beasts.

dialog.intro: I'm Ilima! As trial captain, I'll test your abilities!
dialog.defeat: Splendid! You've passed the first trial!

dialog.intro: I'm Lana... I fish with my water Pokemon. Shall we battle?
dialog.defeat: You reeled in a victory! Take this crystal!

dialog.intro: I'm Kiawe! My fire dances will light up this battle!
dialog.defeat: Your fire burns bright! Take the Fire Crystal!

dialog.intro: I'm Sophocles! My inventions and electric Pokemon are unstoppable!
dialog.defeat: Your power overloaded my circuits! Take the Electric Crystal!

dialog.intro: I'm Hala, the Kahuna! My fists strike with the force of Alola's volcanoes!
dialog.defeat: You've earned the respect of the islands! Take the Fighting Crystal!

dialog.intro: I'm Olivia, the Kahuna of Akala! My rock Pokemon are as solid as the island!
dialog.defeat: You've shattered my defenses! The Rock Crystal is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Nanu... *sigh* Fine, let's get this battle over with.
dialog.defeat: You actually won... Take this, I guess.

dialog.intro: I'm Hapu, the youngest Kahuna! My ground Pokemon draw power from the earth!
dialog.defeat: You've earned every island's respect! The Ground Crystal is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Molayne! I observe the stars and train steel Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: The stars aligned for you today! Continue!

dialog.intro: We meet again! This time, I won't hold back!
dialog.defeat: You've surpassed even a Kahuna! Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Acerola! My ghost friends and I love to play — I mean battle!
dialog.defeat: That was so fun! Keep going, you're almost there!

dialog.intro: I'm Kahili! I'll drive this battle home like a hole-in-one!
dialog.defeat: A perfect game! You've earned the right to face the Champion!

dialog.intro: Alola, cousin! I'm Professor Kukui! Let me show you the power of Alola!
dialog.defeat: Yeah! That's what I call a battle! You're Alola's Champion, cousin!

name: Galar
description: An industrial region with a love for Pokemon battles. Home of Dynamax!

dialog.intro: I'm Milo! My grass Pokemon and I work the fields — and the battlefield!
dialog.defeat: You've plowed right through me! Take the Grass Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Nessa! My water Pokemon will wash away your confidence!
dialog.defeat: You've made quite a splash! Take the Water Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Kabu! I'll test your resolve with the heat of battle!
dialog.defeat: You've passed my test! Take the Fire Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Bea! My fighting Pokemon and I train in silence!
dialog.defeat: ...Your strength speaks louder than words. Take the Fighting Badge.

dialog.intro: I'm... Allister... My ghost Pokemon will... show you fear...
dialog.defeat: You're... not afraid... Take the Ghost Badge...

dialog.intro: I'm Opal! At my age, I know the true magic of fairy Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: How enchanting! You've earned the Fairy Badge, dearie!

dialog.intro: I'm Gordie! My rock Pokemon will crush your dreams!
dialog.defeat: Crushed by a challenger! Take the Rock Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Raihan! I'll take a selfie with your defeat! #DragonMaster
dialog.defeat: You've photobombed my winning streak! Take the Dragon Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Marnie! Team Yell's cheerin' me on! Let's battle!
dialog.defeat: That was ace! You're really strong! Go on!

dialog.intro: It's me, Hop! I'm gonna give it everything I've got!
dialog.defeat: You're just as amazing as Lee! Keep going, mate!

dialog.intro: I'm Bede! I was chosen by Chairman Rose himself — I mean, I chose fairy Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: Hmph! You're... adequate. Proceed!

dialog.intro: We meet again! This time, my water Pokemon won't hold back!
dialog.defeat: You've made a bigger splash than ever! Face the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Leon, the unbeatable Champion! Let's have a champion time!
dialog.defeat: My time as Champion is over... but what a battle! You're the new Champion!

name: Paldea
description: An open-world region with three grand adventures. Home to the Treasures of Ruin.

dialog.intro: I'm Katy! I run a bakery and train bug Pokemon on the side!
dialog.defeat: Sweet victory for you! Take the Bug Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Brassius! My art and grass Pokemon are one and the same!
dialog.defeat: A masterpiece of a battle! The Grass Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: Hey-o! I'm Iono, your fave streamer! Let's give chat a show!
dialog.defeat: OMG, chat, we lost! But GG! Take the Electric Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Kofu! I'm a chef who battles with the freshest water Pokemon!
dialog.defeat: A well-cooked battle! The Water Badge is yours!

dialog.intro: I'm Larry... Just a regular guy with regular Pokemon. Let's get this over with.
dialog.defeat: Well, back to my regular routine. Take the Normal Badge.

dialog.intro: Yo, I'm Ryme! My ghost Pokemon drop sick beats from beyond!
dialog.defeat: That battle was fire! Take the Ghost Badge, fam!

dialog.intro: I'm Tulip! Beauty and psychic power go hand in hand!
dialog.defeat: Your inner beauty shines through! Take the Psychic Badge!

dialog.intro: I'm Grusha. I used to snowboard, but now I battle. Let's go.
dialog.defeat: Cool run. Take the Ice Badge.

dialog.intro: I'm Rika! I'll dig up the truth about your strength!
dialog.defeat: The evidence is clear — you're the real deal! Move on!

dialog.intro: I'm Poppy! D-don't underestimate me because I'm small!
dialog.defeat: Wow, you're really strong! G-go on!

dialog.intro: It's me again, Larry. Surprise, I also train flying Pokemon. Let's just do this.
dialog.defeat: Sigh. You won again. I need a vacation. Continue.

dialog.intro: I'm Hassel! My dragon Pokemon are as refined as the finest art!
dialog.defeat: A masterwork of battle! Face the Champion!

dialog.intro: I'm Geeta, the Top Champion! Show me what you've learned on your journey!
dialog.defeat: Your journey has made you truly exceptional! You're the new Top Champion!
